title: Getting Over It
description: Quick and dirty recreation of the classic rage game in minecraft
body:
This data pack is a quick and dirty recreation of *Getting Over It with Bennet Foddy.*
It gives you two things:
- A mace that sends you flying when you click on a block
- Some leggings that negate fall damage, but they lock you in place and can't be taken off
The ZIP file also contains custom model data for the mace.
